<!-- indicator: fig-uc-impact-sdoh -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-uc-impact-sdoh
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of the Social Determinants of Health in Ulster County (n = 70)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing The Impact of the Social Determinants of Health in Ulster County (n = 70).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-uc-impact-sdoh", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
